gaps: No test covers the scenario where device artwork/icon is missing on the Home screen device card for Poly Voyager Free 60+
No test covers firmware update failure from a specific baseline firmware version (v231.591.0.5046 MR1.5) on Poly Voyager Free 60+
No test covers firmware update failure via Poly Studio Mobile iOS app when device artwork is missing
No test covers firmware update failure via Poly PTT (Plantronics Technician Tool) on iOS for Voyager Free 60+
No test covers the correlation between missing device artwork on Home screen and subsequent firmware update failures
No test covers firmware update from MR1.5 baseline specifically on Voyager Free 60+ (existing tests focus on language change DFU scenarios, not baseline firmware update failures)

generated_testcases.title: TC-FW-001: Verify Poly Voyager Free 60+ device artwork displays on Home screen after fresh connection
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS
Ensure no previously paired Poly devices are in Bluetooth settings
Put Poly Voyager Free 60+ earbuds in pairing mode (press and hold both earbud buttons for 3 seconds)
Tap 'Add Device' on the Poly Studio Mobile Home screen
Select 'Poly Voyager Free 60+' from the device list
Complete the pairing and connection wizard
Observe the Home screen device card for the connected Voyager Free 60+
Verify the device icon/artwork is displayed (not a generic placeholder or missing image)
Navigate to Device → Audio Settings → Transparency Mode → Environment
Return to Home screen and verify device artwork is still present
generated_testcases.expected: Poly Voyager Free 60+ device artwork/icon is displayed correctly on the Home screen device card. No generic placeholder, broken image, or missing artwork is observed. Artwork persists after navigating to other screens and returning.

generated_testcases.title: TC-FW-002: Verify device artwork persists on Home screen after app restart for Voyager Free 60+
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS
Connect to Poly Voyager Free 60+ (already paired)
Verify device artwork is displayed on Home screen device card
Force-close the Poly Studio Mobile app (swipe up from app switcher)
Re-launch Poly Studio Mobile app
Observe the Home screen device card for the Voyager Free 60+
Verify the device artwork/icon is still displayed correctly
generated_testcases.expected: Device artwork for Poly Voyager Free 60+ persists and displays correctly on the Home screen device card after app force-close and relaunch.

generated_testcases.title: TC-FW-003: Verify firmware update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) via Poly Studio Mobile iOS app succeeds when artwork is present
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS
Connect to Poly Voyager Free 60+ running firmware v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5)
Verify device artwork is displayed on Home screen device card (precondition check)
Navigate to Device → Device Information → Firmware Update
Tap 'Check for Update'
If an update is available, tap 'Download and Install'
Keep the app in foreground and earbuds in charging case with case lid open
Wait for the firmware update process to complete (download → transfer → install)
Observe the progress indicator and status messages throughout the update
After update completes, verify the device reconnects automatically
Navigate to Device → Device Information and verify the new firmware version is displayed
generated_testcases.expected: Firmware update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) completes successfully via Poly Studio Mobile iOS app. Progress indicator shows download, transfer, and installation stages. Device reconnects automatically. New firmware version is displayed in Device Information. No error messages or failures occur during the process.

generated_testcases.title: TC-FW-004: Verify firmware update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) fails gracefully when device artwork is missing on Home screen
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS
Connect to Poly Voyager Free 60+ running firmware v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5)
Observe the Home screen device card — confirm device artwork is MISSING (generic placeholder shown)
Navigate to Device → Device Information → Firmware Update
Tap 'Check for Update'
If an update is available, tap 'Download and Install'
Keep the app in foreground and earbuds in charging case with case lid open
Monitor the firmware update process
Note any error messages, stuck progress bars, or failure notifications
After failure, verify the device is still responsive (reconnect if needed)
Navigate to Device → Device Information and verify firmware version is still v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5)
generated_testcases.expected: Firmware update fails or exhibits abnormal behavior (stuck progress, error message, silent failure) when device artwork is missing. The device remains on firmware v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) and is still connectable. This test documents the correlation between missing artwork and firmware update failure.

generated_testcases.title: TC-FW-005: Verify firmware update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) via Poly PTT (Plantronics Technician Tool) on iOS succeeds
steps: Launch Poly PTT (Plantronics Technician Tool) on iOS
Connect to Poly Voyager Free 60+ running firmware v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5)
Verify the device is detected and displayed in PTT with correct model name
Navigate to the firmware update section in PTT
Select the latest available firmware for Voyager Free 60+
Initiate the firmware update process
Keep the earbuds in the charging case with case lid open during the update
Monitor the update progress in PTT
Wait for the update to complete (download → transfer → install → reboot)
After completion, verify the device reconnects
Check the firmware version displayed in PTT to confirm the update was applied
generated_testcases.expected: Firmware update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) completes successfully via Poly PTT on iOS. The update progresses through all stages without errors. Device reconnects and displays the new firmware version in PTT.

generated_testcases.title: TC-FW-006: Verify firmware update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) via Poly PTT on iOS fails when device artwork is missing in Poly Studio Mobile
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS
Connect to Poly Voyager Free 60+ running firmware v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5)
Verify device artwork is MISSING on Home screen device card
Close Poly Studio Mobile app (background it, do not force-close)
Launch Poly PTT on iOS
Connect to the same Poly Voyager Free 60+
Navigate to firmware update section in PTT
Select the latest firmware and initiate the update
Monitor the update process for any errors or failures
Note any error codes, stuck states, or failure messages
After failure, verify device is still on firmware v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5)
generated_testcases.expected: Firmware update via Poly PTT fails or exhibits abnormal behavior when the device artwork is missing in Poly Studio Mobile. This confirms the correlation between the missing artwork state (potentially indicating a device identification/registration issue) and firmware update failures across both Poly Studio Mobile and PTT tools.

generated_testcases.title: TC-FW-007: Verify device artwork restoration and subsequent successful firmware update after app data clear
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS
Connect to Poly Voyager Free 60+ running firmware v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5)
Confirm device artwork is MISSING on Home screen device card
Navigate to iOS Settings → Poly Studio Mobile → Clear App Data / Reset
Alternatively, delete and reinstall Poly Studio Mobile app
Launch Poly Studio Mobile app fresh
Pair and connect to Poly Voyager Free 60+ again
Verify device artwork is now displayed correctly on Home screen device card
Navigate to Device → Device Information → Firmware Update
Tap 'Check for Update' and proceed with firmware update
Complete the firmware update process
Verify the update succeeds and new firmware version is displayed
generated_testcases.expected: After clearing app data or reinstalling, the device artwork is restored on the Home screen. The firmware update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) then completes successfully, confirming that the missing artwork state was correlated with the firmware update failure.

generated_testcases.title: TC-FW-008: Verify firmware update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) fails when device artwork is missing — repeatability test (3 cycles)
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS
Connect to Poly Voyager Free 60+ running firmware v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5)
Verify device artwork is MISSING on Home screen device card
Navigate to Device → Device Information → Firmware Update
Attempt firmware update — note the result (expected: failure)
Force-close Poly Studio Mobile app
Re-launch app and reconnect to device
Verify artwork is still MISSING
Attempt firmware update again — note the result
Force-close app, reconnect, verify artwork missing, attempt firmware update a third time
Document the outcome of all 3 attempts
generated_testcases.expected: The firmware update failure is consistently reproducible across 3 consecutive attempts when device artwork is missing. This confirms the issue is not intermittent and is directly correlated with the missing artwork state.

generated_testcases.title: TC-FW-009: Verify device artwork state after Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect cycle for Voyager Free 60+ on MR1.5
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS
Connect to Poly Voyager Free 60+ running firmware v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5)
Observe and record whether device artwork is present or missing on Home screen
Disconnect Bluetooth: turn off Bluetooth on the iOS device
Wait 10 seconds
Re-enable Bluetooth on the iOS device
Wait for automatic reconnection to Voyager Free 60+
Observe the Home screen device card — check if artwork is present or missing
Repeat the disconnect/reconnect cycle 3 times
After each cycle, record the artwork state (present/missing)
generated_testcases.expected: The device artwork state (present or missing) is consistent across Bluetooth disconnect/reconnect cycles. If artwork was missing initially, it remains missing after reconnection. If present, it remains present. No state change occurs due to Bluetooth cycling alone.

generated_testcases.title: TC-FW-010: Verify firmware update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) via Poly Studio Mobile iOS app with low battery condition
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on iOS
Connect to Poly Voyager Free 60+ running firmware v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5)
Verify device artwork is present on Home screen device card
Check battery level of earbuds and charging case (should be >50%)
Navigate to Device → Device Information → Firmware Update
Tap 'Check for Update'
If update is available, tap 'Download and Install'
During the firmware transfer phase, place the earbuds in the charging case
Monitor the update process for any interruptions or errors
Verify the update completes successfully
generated_testcases.expected: Firmware update from v231.591.0.5046 (MR1.5) completes successfully when battery level is sufficient. The update process handles the earbuds being placed in the charging case during transfer without errors.
